about.source: BfArM 'Qualitätskontrolle der eingelieferten klinischen Daten durch klinische Datenknoten (KDK)', MV GenomSeq, Version 01.2 (01.06.2026), Tabelle 1 (Kriterien 1-12).
about.applies_to: KDK Datenkranz: oncology (case.diagnosisOd) and rare-disease (case.diagnosisRd) branches. Off unless enabled with --kdk-rules.
about.field_mapping_note: The QS document names fields loosely (e.g. 'submissionDate', 'AllgemeineDaten/birthDate', 'followUpOd/...'); the params below use the ACTUAL KDK JSON paths verified against the schema + synthetic data (metaData.submission.date, metaData.birthDate, followUp.followUpOds[].*).
about.not_implemented_here: Criterion 2 (LE-ID list) and 11 (own node id) need external resources -> id_in_list / id_equals_config SKIP (info) unless supplied via --rules-config. Criterion 4 (terminology resolvability) is covered by the schema/terminology tooling, not a semantic rule.
about.engine: primitives are implemented in rules.py; the engine reads id/primitive/severity/params only.

rules.doc: Kriterium 1: age at report time in [0,130] years (submission.date YYYY - birthDate YYYY).
Kriterium 2: submitterId must be a known 64e LE id (and admitted for the diseaseType). Needs the BfArM LE-ID CSV via --rules-config {le_ids:[...]}. Disease-subset admission is not modelled here.
Kriterium 3: index must consent to sequencing: an mvConsent.scope entry with type=permit AND domain=mvSequencing.
Kriterium 5: when TNM is present, exactly one code each for T, N and M.
Kriterium 6: no date-format field may lie before the (minimal) birthDate floor (YYYY-MM-01).

Kriterium 7: for submission.type=initial all date fields must precede molecularBoardDecisionDate; for followup they must precede the follow-up date. Excludes researchConsents.presentationDate and submission.date. (type=test: no anchor -> skipped.)
Kriterium 8: mvConsent.presentationDate must not be after the signature date mvConsent.scope[].date.
Kriterium 9: the molecular board decision (Fallkonferenz) must not be before the MV consent signature.
Kriterium 9: dated actions/decisions requiring prior consent must lie on/after the MV consent signature date.
Kriterium 10: for rare disease, panel/WES are excluded -> libraryType in {wgs, wgs_lr, none}.
Kriterium 11: clinicalDataNodeId must equal the receiving KDK's own id. Supply via --rules-config {clinical_data_node_id:'...'}.
Kriterium 12: research-consent noScopeJustification limited to patient-related reasons; the two technical/organizational values are no longer allowed.

allowed: patient did not return consent documents
